description.content: Search, match, and retrieve local business data
Returns up to 240 businesses based on the provided search criteria. Either location or a latitude/longitude pair is required.

query.description: Geographic area to search. Required if latitude and longitude are not provided.
Latitude of the search center. Required if location is not provided.
Longitude of the search center. Required if location is not provided.
Search term, such as "food" or a business name.
Search radius in meters. Maximum 40000.
Comma-delimited list of category aliases to filter by.
Locale in the form {language}_{country}, e.g. en_US.
Comma-delimited list of price levels (1, 2, 3, 4).
Return only businesses open at the time of the request.
Return businesses open at the given Unix timestamp.
Comma-delimited list of business attributes to filter by.
Sort mode for results.
Number of results to return.
Offset into the list of returned results.

Matches the supplied business attributes against businesses on Yelp, returning the best candidate matches. Useful for resolving your own records to a Yelp business id.

(Required) City of the business.
(Required) ISO 3166-2 state code of the business.

Postal/ZIP code of the business.
Latitude of the business.
Longitude of the business.
Phone number of the business.
A Yelp business id hint to improve match accuracy.
Number of matches to return.
How strictly candidates must match the input.

Conversational Yelp Fusion AI search and chat
Sends a natural language query to the Yelp Fusion AI and returns a conversational response plus structured business entities. Supports multi-turn conversations via chat_id.

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

The Yelp Fusion API provides programmatic access to Yelp's database of local businesses, reviews, events, categories, and conversational AI search. This definition documents the public Fusion REST endpoints: business search and discovery, business details, reviews, autocomplete, phone search, business match, events, categories, and the Yelp Fusion AI chat endpoint. Authentication is via a bearer API key passed in the Authorization header.

Contact Support:
 Name: Yelp Developer
